code: export const digitsOnly=function(){let value=arguments.length>0&&arguments[0]!==undefined?arguments[0]:'';return String(value).replace(/\D/g,'');};export const formatPakCnic=function(){let value=arguments.length>0&&arguments[0]!==undefined?arguments[0]:'';const digits=digitsOnly(value).slice(0,13);if(digits.length<=5){return digits;}if(digits.length<=12){return"".concat(digits.slice(0,5),"-").concat(digits.slice(5));}return"".concat(digits.slice(0,5),"-").concat(digits.slice(5,12),"-").concat(digits.slice(12));};
